places.name: Gateway of India
places.culturalNudge: Best visited at sunrise for fewer crowds. Photography is permitted.

places.name: Leopold Cafe
places.culturalNudge: Historic cafe since 1871. No dress code but smart casual preferred.

places.name: Bombay Stock Exchange
places.culturalNudge: Visits require prior arrangement. Business attire required.

places.name: Marine Drive
places.culturalNudge: Evening walks recommended. Known as the Queen's Necklace at night.

places.name: WeWork BKC
places.culturalNudge: Day passes available. Good connectivity area.

places.name: Bademiya
places.culturalNudge: Iconic street food. Cash only. Late night favourite.

places.name: Sanjay Gandhi National Park
places.culturalNudge: Contains ancient Kanheri Caves. Wear comfortable shoes.

places.name: Jogger's Park
places.culturalNudge: Great for morning jogs. Sea-facing walking track.

places.name: Prithvi Theatre
places.culturalNudge: Book in advance. Try their famous Irish coffee.

places.name: Gold's Gym Bandra
places.culturalNudge: Day passes available for travellers.

places.name: Marina Bay Sands
places.culturalNudge: SkyPark observation deck has the best views. Book ahead.

places.name: Hawker Chan
places.culturalNudge: World's cheapest Michelin star. Queue can be 45+ mins.

places.name: Gardens by the Bay
places.culturalNudge: Free outdoor gardens. Conservatories need tickets. Light show at 19:45 and 20:45.

places.name: WeWork Beach Centre
places.culturalNudge: Great for business meetings. Near Raffles Hotel.

places.name: Newton Food Centre
places.culturalNudge: Touristy but authentic. Try Satay and Chilli Crab.

places.name: Sentosa Island
places.culturalNudge: Take the cable car for best views. Sunscreen essential.

places.name: Singapore Botanic Gardens
places.culturalNudge: UNESCO World Heritage Site. Free entry except orchid garden.

places.name: Virgin Active Tanjong Pagar
places.culturalNudge: Premium gym. Day passes available.

places.name: Long Bar at Raffles
places.culturalNudge: Home of the Singapore Sling. Smart casual dress code.

places.name: Little India
places.culturalNudge: Vibrant cultural district. Visit Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple.

places.name: British Museum
places.culturalNudge: Free entry. Photography allowed in most galleries.

places.name: Borough Market
places.culturalNudge: Open Wed-Sat. Best visited before noon for fewer crowds.

places.name: WeWork Waterloo
places.culturalNudge: Excellent transport links. Meeting rooms available.

places.name: Hyde Park
places.culturalNudge: Great for morning runs. Serpentine Lido open in summer.

places.name: Dishoom King's Cross
places.culturalNudge: Bombay-inspired cafe. Try the bacon naan. Long queues at peak.

places.name: Third Space City
places.culturalNudge: Premium gym. Day passes via app.

places.name: Tower of London
places.culturalNudge: Book online to skip the queue. Allow 3 hours minimum.

places.name: Sky Garden
places.culturalNudge: Free but must book online weeks in advance.

places.name: The Ivy
places.culturalNudge: Iconic restaurant. Smart casual dress code. Book ahead.

places.name: Tate Modern
places.culturalNudge: Free entry. Special exhibitions charged. Great views from Level 10.

places.name: Central Park
places.culturalNudge: 843 acres. Rent a bike or take a horse carriage ride.

places.name: Joe's Pizza
places.culturalNudge: Iconic NYC pizza since 1975. Cash only.

places.name: The Met
places.culturalNudge: Pay-what-you-wish for NY residents. Allow 4+ hours.

places.name: WeWork Bryant Park
places.culturalNudge: Great location near Grand Central. Day passes available.

places.name: Brooklyn Bridge
places.culturalNudge: Walk from Brooklyn to Manhattan for best views. Early morning recommended.

places.name: Equinox Hudson Yards
places.culturalNudge: Premium gym. Day passes via app.

places.name: Le Bernardin
places.culturalNudge: 3 Michelin stars. Jacket required. Book weeks ahead.

places.name: High Line
places.culturalNudge: Elevated park on old railway. Great for walking and art.

places.name: Times Square
places.culturalNudge: Iconic but touristy. Visit at night for the full neon experience.

places.name: Sweetgreen Nomad
places.culturalNudge: Healthy fast-casual. Great for a quick business lunch.

places.name: Senso-ji Temple
places.culturalNudge: Remove shoes inside. Photography ok outside. Dress modestly.

places.name: Ichiran Ramen Shibuya
places.culturalNudge: Fill out the preference sheet. Solo booths — normal in Japan.

places.name: Meiji Jingu Shrine
places.culturalNudge: Bow at torii gates. Wash hands at temizuya. Quiet respect expected.

places.name: Anytime Fitness Roppongi
places.culturalNudge: Bring your own towel. Shoes off in changing room.

places.name: Tsukiji Outer Market
places.culturalNudge: Eat while walking is frowned upon. Find a spot to stand.

places.name: Shibuya Crossing
places.culturalNudge: Best viewed from Starbucks above. Most photogenic at night.

places.name: Shimokitazawa
places.culturalNudge: Bohemian neighbourhood. Great for vintage shopping and indie cafes.

places.name: WeWork Marunouchi
places.culturalNudge: Near Tokyo Station. Excellent for business meetings.

places.name: Roppongi Hills
places.culturalNudge: Mori Art Museum on top floor. Sky Deck has amazing city views.

places.name: Tonkatsu Maisen
places.culturalNudge: Famous tonkatsu in a converted bathhouse. Queue at lunch.
